titleStmt.title: SII 8.362: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 362. (A.R. No. 83 of 1903). ON A ROCK NEAR THE DESERTED TEMPLE OF NARASIMHA ON THE HILL AT GOOTY, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁgaḷu 1429 neya prabhavasaṁvva
tsarada vaiśākha śu 10 gulu śrīmatu penugoṁḍeya haṭṭidereya Apparasanavara basava
rasara maga tiṁmayanu śānabōva tiṁmarasara maga lakkeyanu ja 2 ru taṁmoḷage yēkastarāgi
pōtula tiṁmagauṁḍana maga kāpagauṁḍage koṭṭa jayalēkheya śāsanada kramaveṁteṁda
re nāU baṁdu niṁmanu naṁma penugoṁḍeya haṭṭidereya kuḷada Okkalu naṁmakuḷada
paṁnu terabēkuyeṁdu niṁmanu hiḍiyalāgi nīU Āḍidamātu nāU penugoṁ
ḍeya haṭṭidereya kuḷada vokkalu Alli naṁma mutaiyyamūru tharadavara hesa
ravahiyanu tarisidara nāU nimage tithe veṁdu Āḍuviri nāU niṁma
kkuḷada vahiyanū yeṁdu vōdalāgi Adu naṁma kuḷadalli naṁma hiriya
ra hesaru Allayeṁdu nīvu Āḍalāgi nāU nīU Ahudu Allayeṁdu pra
tigñamāḍikoṁḍa vivara nāU penugoṁḍege mutaiyya mūru tharadavaru haṭṭide
reya kuḷavokkalu Allayeṁdu jaruṭla rāmayadēvaru muṁde pramāṇavanū māḍi
muyyaḷuyisāṁduri namanu jaIstiri nīU jayisidadake yeṁdeṁdu naṁma penugoṁ
ḍeya haṭṭidereya Okkalu Alli namage nimage kāraṇavillayeṁdu śilākṣaravanu ba
radukoṭṭevu . Iṁtopudake sākṣigaḷu guttiya dēvaraṇana maga Alapayana bhūpāḷada
AUbhaḷiseṭṭiyara makkaḷu tipiseṭiyaru guttiya tipireḍiyara maga malireḍi
nāgauṁḍana maga tipi gauṁḍanu Iṁtivara Ubhayānumatadiṁ bara
da sēnabōva māramarasa nārasiṁhayana maga Ā Ubhaḷayanu śilālikhita
va baradukoṭṭa tiṁmappa Akayana Opa tiṁmayana baraha lakhaya
na baraha sākṣigaḷa Opa Aparasana sākṣi baraha .
bhūpāḷara tippayya vrālu . mallireḍi
gaṇādhipati nāgaunitippana kumara
Ilāradēvaru [.]
Digital edition of SII 8.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
